topic.what: Monetarily Exploitable Vulnerability (MEVul) detection in smart contracts via auditor knowledge-learning fuzzing
topic.how: NLP extraction from auditor reports + rule-based function sequence generation + self-learning Markov strategy + MEVul oracles for four financial paradigms
topic.why_matters: Existing tools miss 98% of exploitable vulnerabilities; $5.4B losses from 2022-2023 due to MEVuls that traditional opcode-level detection cannot capture

characteristics.evidence: Table II: 125/138 MEVuls detected vs benchmark miss >82

characteristics.what_it_measures: New MEVuls found not detected by existing tools
characteristics.context: 12 confirmed by developers as of submission

characteristics.what_it_measures: Code path exploration depth on DApp testing
Code path exploration on individual contracts

characteristics.vs_baseline: FAUDITOR outperforms ILF and Echidna for 6/9 types
characteristics.evidence: Figure 3a: fewer transactions for most vulnerability types
characteristics.context: 9 vulnerability types tested including 4 MEVuls and 5 traditional

characteristics.vs_baseline: Existing tools: 1.98% exploitable rate in reports
characteristics.evidence: Perez [21] cited; FAUDITOR targets monetary exploitability
characteristics.context: Precision focus on financially exploitable issues

requires: Auditor report corpus for NLP training

novelty: First formalization of MEVuls into four paradigms (Transfer Arrival/Balance Conservation/Swap Rate Stability/Fund Value Stability)
Rule-based function sequence generation from auditor reports using NLP
Self-learning Markov-based strategy with Q-function optimization
Contract-Compatible Interface for multi-version EVM and proxy contract handling
Key variable monitoring via ABI interfaces for financial anomaly detection
open_problems: Scaling NLP extraction to novel auditor report formats
Handling complex flash loan attacks with atomic multi-transaction sequences
Adapting to emerging DeFi mechanisms without fresh training data
Reducing overhead for large-scale contract corpus scanning
